creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Since the introduction of FLAVORS, the INDEX no longer includes any misc/compat*x-amd64 entries and "pkg version" shows:
compat10x-amd64-10.3.1003000.20170608 ?   orphaned: misc/compat10x
compat9x-amd64-9.3.903000.20170608 ?   orphaned: misc/compat9x

The i386 versions are present.

I am not positive that FLAVOR introduction triggered this, but I strongly suspect that it did. It is present when I manually build the index on my local system. It is only missing when I use the pre-built index with "make fetchindex".
